name: Eva Everywhere
description: Eva Everywhere is an autonomous AI platform designed to operate a real-world business using a legally compliant corporate structure for governance and oversight. Eva functions as a multi-agent system that performs operational, administrative, and decision-making tasks such as communication, scheduling, document creation, task planning, and automation across messaging platforms, devices, and cloud environments. The project serves both as a consumer-facing AI assistant for “life administration” and as a proof-of-concept platform enabling others to build and deploy AI-driven companies with minimal human overhead. The $EVA token is a functional utility asset within the Eva ecosystem. Eva earns 1% of all $EVA token trading volume generated on Bags.fm, with these royalties programmatically assigned directly to Eva rather than to founders or operators. Funds are held in an AI-designated multi-signature treasury wallet, where Eva autonomously manages allocations for infrastructure, compute, development, and operations within predefined governance guardrails and corporate oversight. This structure enables Eva to control her own treasury while remaining compliant with real-world legal and financial requirements.
